text:
You are working on issue str-3ky9.17: strace-based dep discovery tool.

**Goal**: Add optional `shatter discover-deps --strace` command that uses strace to catalog all network syscalls (connect, sendto, sendmsg, socket ~10-15 syscalls) made by a function. One-shot diagnostic tool, not for runtime interception.

**Acceptance criteria**:
- strace-based discovery lists network syscalls with source info
- Works on Linux
- Clearly documented as diagnostic-only

**Context**: This depends on str-3ky9.12 (Execution-time dep gap detection, done). This is a new CLI subcommand.

Run `bd show str-3ky9.17` for full issue details. Study the existing CLI structure in shatter-cli/src/main.rs and how other subcommands are wired.

**Your task**: Task #4 in the team task list. Claim it, plan your approach, implement, test, commit, and mark done. Follow all project conventions in CLAUDE.md (especially shatter-cli/CLAUDE.md). Update demo/walkthrough.sh if adding a new CLI command. Run clippy + tests before committing.
